learning.leakage_note: prefer excluding WhatsThatBook/BIRCO evaluation queries, book descriptions, and candidate pools from training data
useful_training_data: non-overlapping book-finding posts matched to book descriptions
synthetic noisy memory queries paired with book descriptions

synthetic_data.document_generation: book descriptions with plot, characters, setting, genre, cover-like details, and memorable scenes
synthetic_data.question_generation: noisy user memory posts with approximate dates, uncertainty, partial plot fragments, character details, and cover recollections
synthetic_data.answerability: the positive description should holistically match the full combination of remembered clues

references.title: BIRCO: A Benchmark of Information Retrieval Tasks with Complex Objectives
